channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Weeds, 20th July
item.description:
There are weeds and plants growing out of the kerb.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): West Way, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead Fox - Reported and Closed as Complete But Dead Fox Still There, 20th July
item.description:
The dead fox which is in the alley way at the back of Brook Street 178 - 180 is still there. The public use the alley way to walk down and the dead fox is in a bad state, My original report was closed as completed, but the dead fox is still there.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Collindale Avenue, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Fly-tip Small - Up to 3 black bags problem has been found, 20th July
item.description:
A Fly-tip Small

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gorefield Place, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Untaxed car, 20th July
item.description:
This car now has a parking ticket Untaxed since 01/09/2013 Mot expired 20/09/2014
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Aylesbury Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Leaning bollard, 20th July
item.description:
(With weeds around it). Please see the photo.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bexley Lane, Albany Park, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping, 20th July
item.description:
Fly tipping close to traffic light

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greenwich South Street, Greenwich

item.title: 228 Belsize Road, 20th July
item.description:
Water has been pooling on carriageway and granite curb slippery at times over last week. It looks like there’s some deterioration here - poss the start of sink hole

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 228, Belsize Road, South Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lazy council, 20th July
item.description:
This is more filth in the area ! Bromley LB are a joke

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 11, Dunbar Avenue, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Victoria road, by Brent’s Lock It bike hangar BH166, 20th July
item.description:
Both private and public overgrown vegetation blocking entirely the pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Donaldson Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Obstruction - Overgrown / overhanging private tree / hedge

item.title: Dumping garden waste, 20th July
item.description:
Person employed by 8 Picardy Road wheeling rubbish down road in a shopping trolley and dumping said rubbish in alleyway between garage and dentist.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ambrooke Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge still here, 20th July
item.description:
Fridge still here.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Longville Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Lime bikes outside demarcated area, on yellow line, blocking roadway and driveway access (there was lots space in the designated area, so pure laziness and ‘could not care’ attitude. Should be fined and banned from hiring in the future), 20th July
item.description:
Two bikes blocking road and access, left on yellow line roadway, also on bus route

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 92, Canfield Gardens, South Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked chute in Theobalds Court Kings Crescent Estate, 20th July
item.description:
There has been a blocked chute in Theobalds Court next to no.9 for several weeks. It was partially cleared around 2 weeks ago. Due to the heat this is now causing a fly & fruit fly infestation in many several of our properties. This is now causing an H&S

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Codicote Terrace, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Family with dog in playground, 20th July
item.description:
There doesn’t appear to be a notice at the playground that says dogs aren’t allowed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eynsford Close, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumprd foot stool, 20th July
item.description:
Left on the road side

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alexandra Crescent, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Consistent parking in the bike lane, 20th July
item.description:
Nearly every day vehicles block this cycle lane. It’s just blatant disregard for anyone.the shop has a car park right next to it and they can’t be bothered to use it.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hertford Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead Fox, 20th July
item.description:
Dead Fox inside a bag o/s 8 Strata road. Please can we arrange for it to be removed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Strata Road, Northumberland Heath, Erith, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Low hanging branches, 20th July
item.description:
The branches & foliage of this tree are now well below head height over the full width of the path and need pruning to a safe height.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rotherhithe Street, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped 2 supermarket trolleys and exercise machine flytipped, 20th July
item.description:
At the far end of Evergreen Close on the right next to the bushes on the footpath someone has dumped an exercise machine and on the grass area just in front there has been dumped 2 supermarket trolleys. Please can you remove them. Many thanks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Evergreen Close, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown plant blocking pavement, 20th July
item.description:
Plants so overgrown that the pavement is almost completely blocked.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 141a-141h, Rotherhithe Street, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
